name: Life in the Spirit Seminar
description: Join Fr. John Mockler, Fr. John Keane, Fr. John McCarthy, Bernadette Goulding, Fr. Pat Corkery, Canon Donal O' Mahony, and more for our Life in the Spirit Seminar series every Thursday 7:30pm from April 16th until May 21st

name: St. Mark Scripture Retreat
description: Fr. Thomas Cacciola CFR for a deep dive into the gospel of St. Mark for the feast of St. Mark the Evangelist. Featuring Adoration, Lectio, Exegesis on the gospel of Mark
